raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XXXX 2024, a {$92.00} charge from XXXX Car Rental appeared on my American Express card ( last four digits : XXXX ). I did not authorize this transaction and have no agreement or rental with XXXX for that date or amount. This is the third unauthorized charge from XXXX on my account, despite American Express previously assuring me that the merchant would be blocked. Prior unauthorized charges were refunded after dispute. I have contacted both XXXX and American Express multiple times, but this unauthorized charge remains unresolved. My only legitimate XXXX transaction was on XXXX XXXX 2024, for {$540.00}.
